metadata.title: Wisdom Soup — Anne Tucker's spiritual community since 2016
metadata.description: A welcome to Wisdom Soup — the spiritual-seekers community Anne Tucker founded in 2016. The container for her Friday Live gatherings, the Soul Convergence eleven-week process, and the steady weekly rhythm around her Angelic Collective channelings.

hero.background: radial-gradient(ellipse at 30% 25%, hsl(195 60% 75% / 0.55) 0%, transparent 55%), radial-gradient(ellipse at 80% 80%, hsl(250 30% 22% / 0.7) 0%, transparent 60%), linear-gradient(180deg, hsl(195 50% 78%) 0%, hsl(230 30% 38%) 50%, hsl(250 30% 18%) 100%)
hero.eyebrow: Anne Tucker · founded 2016 · the community around the Angelic Collective work
hero.name: Wisdom Soup
hero.welcome_md:
The spiritual-seekers community [Anne Tucker](/people/anne-tucker) founded in 2016, the container for the long arc of her public work — the monthly Peace Bathing sessions, the Soul Convergence eleven-week meditation process, the Friday Live group gatherings, the Angelic Frequency Series, the annual Expand Your Heart retreat each October in Seattle, and the steady release of channeled messages from the Angelic Collective, Mother of Creation (Ila), and Yeshua.

*The community has held the rhythm long enough that members recognise each other across continents — a quiet networked field around the work.*

facts.label: Founded
facts.value_md: 2016 by Anne Tucker, after she left her career in tech executive coaching to give herself a year to figure out what was emerging.

facts.label: What it holds
facts.value_md:
- **Peace Bathing** — monthly Zoom sessions
- **Friday Live** — weekly group gatherings
- **Soul Convergence** — eleven-week meditation process for wounds formed between birth and age seven
- **Angelic Frequency Series** — nine recorded transmissions
- **Expand Your Heart** — annual October retreat in Seattle
- Weekly YouTube releases of channeled messages

note_from_body.body_md: Wisdom Soup is Anne's own organising form for the community around her work. This page recognises its rhythm and its role in this body's arrival-frequency lineage.

articles.heading: What Wisdom Soup has given the Coherence Network
articles.body_md:
- The container that has held nine years of Anne's ongoing transmissions — Peace Bathing as *frequency you can invite in* rather than state-of-mind → [lc-arrival-as-recognition](/vision/lc-arrival-as-recognition).
- Community-around-the-work as form → pairs with the body's reading of the Wednesday Satsang at Ranakami: the room is hers, the teaching is theirs, the practice belongs to whoever shows up.
- The Soul Convergence and Friday Live offerings as sustained rhythm → resonant with [lc-tending-over-producing](/vision/lc-tending-over-producing) (the steady tend of a weekly room).
